title: Fix associative arrays with enum keys (#6034)

features.name: enum typedef with explicit base type as associative array key
features.description: Code should include an enum typedef with explicit integer base type used as an associative array key type
features.snippet:
typedef enum int { INITIAL, RUNNING, SUSPENDED } state_t;
static string state_names[state_t];

features.name: associative array initializer with enum keys using apostrophe syntax
features.description: Code should include an associative array initialized with enum members as keys using the apostrophe syntax

features.name: enum variable used to index associative array
features.description: Code should include an enum-typed variable used to index an associative array
features.snippet:
state_t state = INITIAL;
string name = state_names[state];
